data.name: ChatGreeting
data.value: Hello! How can I help you today?

data.name: APropos
data.value: As a passionate and versatile software developer, I create desktop applications (WinForms), web applications (ASP.NET, Blazor, WCF), and RESTful APIs using C#, VB.NET, SQL Server, and MySQL. Curious and meticulous, I integrate modern technologies such as AI chatbots (Hugging Face) and automated email sending (Twilio SendGrid) to transform ideas into concrete, reliable, and interactive solutions.

data.name: Experience.1.Detail
data.value: Maintenance, bug fixes, and feature additions to existing Windows Forms applications for an international client.\n - Projects: payroll and accounting management, performance optimization, and process reliability.\n - Technologies: VB.NET, C#, Access, and SQL Server.

data.name: Experience.3.Titre
data.value: Developer Intern – ALFA Medical Center, Sonierana

data.name: Experience.3.Detail
data.value:
During my internship, I created a complete software application in C# using WCF and MySQL:
 - Inventory management for the pharmacy and grocery store.
 - Patient tracking to facilitate the organization and planning of care.
 - Optimization of internal processes and improvement of inventory traceability.

data.name: Experience.4.Titre
data.value: C# Developer – Personal Project: Project Evaluation

data.name: Experience.4.Detail
data.value:
Development of a WinForms application in C# that allows users to :
 - Import Excel/CSV files to analyze projects.
 - Calculate the total duration, identify critical tasks, and determine free time.
 - Create an interactive tool for project analysis and planning.

data.name: Experience.5.Titre
data.value: Web Developer Intern – Ministry of Energy and Hydrocarbons

data.name: Experience.5.Detail
data.value:
Development and maintenance of a complete web application for task tracking and management.
 - Design and implementation using ASP.NET Web Forms and C#, with SQL Server for data.
 - Responsive interface with jQuery and Bootstrap for seamless navigation.
 - Smart notifications and automated emails for task tracking and deadline adherence.
 - Optimization of productivity and efficiency for Ministry users.

data.name: Experience.6.Titre
data.value: Web Developer Intern – Ministry of Energy and Hydrocarbons

data.name: Experience.6.Detail
data.value:
Development and maintenance of a complete web application for managing correspondence within the Ministry.
 - Design and implementation using ASP.NET Web Forms and C#, with SQL Server for data management.
 - Responsive interface with jQuery and Bootstrap for seamless navigation.
 - Optimization of productivity and efficiency for Ministry users.

data.name: Experience.7.Titre
data.value: .NET Front-End Developer – EN16931 Electronic Billing Project

data.name: Experience.7.Detail
data.value:
Development and maintenance of an electronic invoicing platform compliant with the European standard EN16931 for a client based in France.
 - Development of modern and responsive interfaces using Blazor and MudBlazor.
 - Integration and consumption of REST APIs in C#.
 - Implementation of business rules related to electronic invoicing.
 - Performance optimization, user experience improvement, and bug fixes.

data.name: Projet.1.Titre
data.value: Interactive Full-Stack .NET Portfolio with AI, Emailing, and Documented API

data.name: Projet.1.Resumer
data.value:
A modern web application developed with .NET 8, C#, Blazor, Entity Framework Core, SQLite, and a RESTful API, offering a fluid interface, an intelligent chatbot (Hugging Face), and an email sending system via Twilio SendGrid.
This project showcases my skills in full-stack development, AI integration, and documented API design using Swagger.

data.name: Projet.1.Detail
data.value:
This portfolio offers a modern and interactive user experience, combining performance, aesthetics, and advanced features:
 - Backend: RESTful API developed with .NET 8, connected to an SQLite database via Entity Framework Core.
 - Frontend: Responsive and animated Blazor interface, displaying my projects with images, descriptions, and external links.
 - Integrated chatbot: Conversational assistant based on Hugging Face, capable of showcasing my skills and achievements.
 - Emailing: Automated and reliable email sending using Twilio SendGrid.
 - API documentation: Swagger UI integration for testing and exploring endpoints directly from the browser.
 - Design & accessibility: Responsive structure, opening of external links (LinkedIn, GitHub) in new tabs, and mobile/desktop compatibility.

data.name: Projet.2.Titre
data.value: WinForms Applications – Accounting and Payroll Management (VB.NET / C#)

data.name: Projet.2.Resumer
data.value: WinForms desktop application suite for accounting and payroll management, developed primarily in VB.NET with some modules in C#, connected to Access and SQL Server databases and usable over a network via RDP or network sharing. Reliability and performance guaranteed for data processing.

data.name: Projet.2.Detail
data.value:
Development and maintenance of a WinForms application suite optimized for accounting and payroll management:
 - Technologies: main project in VB.NET, add-on modules in C#, connection to Access and SQL Server databases.
 - Interface: intuitive and multi-user WinForms, suitable for network use (RDP or network sharing).
 - Advanced features: addition of new features, bug fixes, and performance optimization for reliable and fast data processing.
 - User experience: stable and high-performing applications, facilitating daily accounting and payroll management.

data.name: Projet.3.Titre
data.value: Web Application – Task Tracking and Management

data.name: Projet.3.Resumer
data.value: High-performance web application developed in ASP.NET WebForms (C#) with jQuery, Bootstrap and SQL Server, enabling efficient tracking and management of tasks, with email notifications and alerts for proactive activity monitoring.

data.name: Projet.3.Detail
data.value:
Development of a complete web application for task tracking and management:
 - Technologies: ASP.NET WebForms, C#, jQuery, Bootstrap, SQL Server
 - Task management: creation, due date tracking, and real-time status updates
 - Smart notifications: automatic alerts and emails to notify users of incomplete tasks and ensure deadlines are met
 - User interface: responsive and intuitive design using Bootstrap, offering smooth navigation and an optimal user experience
 - Improved productivity: simplifies task tracking and ensures effective activity control

data.name: Projet.4.Resumer
data.value: Development of an innovative desktop application in C# WinForms with WCF and MySQL, centralizing stock management and patient tracking to transform the organization of the medical center and improve the quality of care.

data.name: Projet.4.Detail
data.value:
Optimized inventory management: real-time monitoring of the pharmacy and grocery sections, with automatic alerts to prevent stockouts and reduce losses.
 - Intelligent patient monitoring: simplified care planning and organization, saving time and improving coordination among medical staff.
 - Improved internal processes: reduced errors, better inventory traceability, and automation of repetitive tasks.
 - Robust and secure technologies: reliable communication via WCF and centralized storage with MySQL, ensuring data integrity and security.
 - Tangible impact: increased operational efficiency, improved experience for staff and patients, and modernization of the medical center's daily operations.

data.name: Projet.5.Titre
data.value: .NET Front-End Developer – EN16931 Electronic Billing Platform

data.name: Projet.5.Resumer
data.value: Participation in the development and maintenance of an electronic invoicing platform compliant with the European standard EN16931 for a client based in France. Development of modern and responsive interfaces with Blazor and MudBlazor, integration of REST APIs in C#, management of business rules related to electronic invoices, performance improvement and optimization of the user experience.

data.name: Projet.5.Detail
data.value:
- Developing user interfaces with Blazor and MudBlazor.
 - Integrating and consuming REST APIs in C#/.NET.
 - Managing electronic invoicing workflows.
 - Implementing business rules compliant with the EN16931 standard.
 - Creating reusable components and maintaining existing code.
 - Optimizing performance and improving UX.
 - Fixing bugs and enhancing the platform's functionality.
 - Collaborating with the back-end and business teams.
 - Using Git for version control and development tracking.
 - Participating in testing and validating features.

data.name: AvailableFor
data.value: Available for freelance assignments or permanent positions.

data.name: MessageChat
data.value: Hello! 😊 I'm Rindra's assistant. How can I help you?
